features.title: Instant setup
features.description: Go from zero to deployed in under 5 minutes. No config files, no boilerplate.

features.title: Any stack
features.description: Angular, React, Next.js — pick your target and compile. Same intent, any output.

features.title: Design system
features.description: SuperCSS ships with every project. Themes, palettes, and components out of the box.

features.title: Mock data
features.description: Start building UI without a backend. Real shapes, realistic content, identical IDs.

features.title: Auth ready
features.description: JWT and session patterns ready to wire up. Add authentication in minutes.

features.title: Live reload
features.description: Frontend and API both hot-reload. No manual restarts, no lost context.
